name: 108"x14" Table Runner Dark Blue Woven - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your dining experience with this Woven Table Runner from Threshold™. The rectangular table runner features a woven stripe pattern in blue that's complemented by fringed edges, adding a sophisticated style you'll love. The 100% cotton table runner helps protect your surface against scratches, spills and messes. Pair with coordinating napkins and placemats to create a stylish dining setting.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
